lint.command: echo "ESLint not configured yet — lint is a no-op until ci-enhancement feature adds it"

blockingIssues.description: The new `onWriteSuccess` callback bumps `refreshKey` in `dualvm/src/App.tsx`, but `dualvm/src/lib/readModel/marketSnapshot.ts` still returns a 10-second cached snapshot keyed only by observer address. Successful writes can therefore leave the market snapshot and embedded recent-activity payload stale until the cache expires, so the original post-write refresh blocker remains unresolved.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document that `loadMarketSnapshot()` uses a 10-second in-memory cache keyed only by observer address and that immediate post-write refresh flows must explicitly invalidate or bypass that cache.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For refresh-related UX fixes, require workers to inspect the concrete read-model modules that own caching (`src/lib/readModel/*`) and verify that any proposed refresh trigger either invalidates or bypasses those caches before they mark the feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `frontend-write-ux-fixes` review found that the worker updated `App.tsx`, `WritePathSection.tsx`, and write-flow status handling but never inspected `src/lib/readModel/marketSnapshot.ts`, so a 10-second cache still masked confirmed writes and reintroduced the original stale-read blocker.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared state does not currently document the frontend read cache at all.
rejectedObservations.reason: The cache existence was already documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md`; this round only added the missing invalidation guidance for immediate post-write refreshes.
